nodes.name: Myiagra
nodes.summary: Myiagra（Myiagra）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联20种鸟类，如Palau flycatcher、Pohnpei flycatcher、Chuuk flycatcher等20种鸟类。

nodes.name: Samoan flycatcher
nodes.summary: Samoan flycatcher（Myiagra albiventris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Samoan flycatcher。

nodes.name: Samoan flycatcher
nodes.summary: The Samoan flycatcher (Myiagra albiventris) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Samoa. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, and rural gardens and is threatened by habitat loss. Taxonomy and systematics The Samoan flycatcher was originally described in the genus Platyrhynchus. Alternate names include Samoan broadbill, Samoan Myiagra, Samoan Myiagra flycatcher and white-vented flycatcher. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
nodes.shortSummary: The Samoan flycatcher (Myiagra albiventris) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Samoa.
